content.body: I think an update is still useful, based on activity in the proposal repo it looks like it's been five years or so since it's been discussed.
The video link for the plenary meeting is now available via [the sign in form.](https://github.com/tc39/Reflector/issues/573)
content.formatted_body: The video link for the plenary meeting is now available via the sign in form.

content.body: Please can someone confirm that it works.
Also, might be good to remove the Google Meet link from the TC39 calendar event, esp. as it's not the right one.

Can you update the template to also have the sign-in form at the top? It's quite difficult to find every time, especially because it does not actually say "form" so I always forget what to search for 😅
I just had the same issue
Folks, when going for stage advancement, please post the correct links to the specs by the deadline. A long spec going for stage 2 was posted just 3 hours ago. That's not enough time to review it.
I reviewed the spec that *was* posted by the deadline, only to find out just now that the wrong link was posted.
content.formatted_body: I reviewed the spec that was posted by the deadline, only to find out just now that the wrong link was posted.
